data.body:
[Nisir's Summit Open Notice]

Operational Plan: Nisir's Summit opened 7/25 (Tue) 10:45 AM (UTC)!
Sensei, please protect Kivotos from the threat of Chroma...!
* Operation Plan Bosses will appear starting 7/26 (Wed) 2:00 AM (UTC).

Official Discord: http://discord.com/invite/bluearchiveglobal
